# Files and directories exempt from the VERSION bump requirement.
# One pattern per line. Glob syntax supported (fnmatch / bash extglob via `case`).
# Lines starting with # are comments. Blank lines are ignored.
# Patterns are matched against the path relative to the repo root.

readme.md
assets/*
assets/**
.github/workflows/exempt.txt
.github/workflows/gomod2nix.yml
